title: orang's create modpack

body:
another create modpack, this one with significantly less mods (I'll probably add more as I play)

This modpack (in it's current state) is basically a kind of "Vanilla+" create modpack. Basic create, a couple addons and optimisation mods.

the goober in the icon is called james and he is NOT smelly!!!!

also [500LRB](https://modrinth.com/user/500LRB) is the reason this exists xD
